text: 457 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «إِذَا دَخَلَ اَلْمُؤْمِنُ قَبْرَهُ نُودِيَ أَلاَ إِنَّ أَوَّلَ حِبَائِكَ اَلْجَنَّةُ ، أَلاَ وَ أَوَّلُ حِبَاءِ مَنْ تَبِعَكَ اَلْمَغْفِرَةُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.457 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) said:
"When a believer enters their grave, it is proclaimed: 'Behold, your first gift is Paradise! And the first gift for those who followed your funeral procession is forgiveness.'"
